subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested Himself through His luminous Name unto all created things, when the Sun of the outward and the inward rose in splendour [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی باسمه المنور علی الکائنات اذا اشرقت شمس الظاهر و الباطن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @love and unity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @station of the Manifestation of God
